summary: Microsoft seen as laggard in AI race vs Amazon/AWS. Google/Meta/MSFT also reporting Q1 earnings tonight. Walmart revenue $713.2B vs Amazon's $716.9B — extremely close race in retail. AWS Graviton CPU now used by 98% of top 1,000 EC2 customers, displacing Intel. Amazon Leo (satellite) competing with SpaceX Starlink — already won Delta, AT&T, Vodafone, NBN, NASA contracts. AWS AI services at $15B ARR in Q1 2026, competing with Azure AI and Google Cloud.
